data.title: Fitts' Law
data.description: Designs large clickable areas to improve interaction efficiency.
data.technical_spec: Button sizes and interactive elements are optimized for tap targets.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifies choices to enhance user decision-making.
data.technical_spec: Interfaces present limited options to reduce cognitive load.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Adopts familiar design patterns to meet user expectations.
data.technical_spec: Consistent navigation and interactions similar to other popular platforms.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Maintains information chunks within the limit of human memory capacity.
data.technical_spec: Information is grouped in chunks of 7±2 elements.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Creates pleasing designs to enhance perceived usability.
data.technical_spec: Visual aesthetics are prioritized to boost user satisfaction.
